account.changePasswordDescription: Update the password used to sign in to your account.

dangerZone.deleteUnavailableDescription: Self-service account deletion is on the roadmap. For now, contact support to remove your account.
dangerZone.deleteUnavailableTitle: Account deletion is not yet available
dangerZone.description: Once your account is deleted, all data is permanently removed.
dangerZone.title: Danger zone

account.title: Account

appearance.defaultViewHelp: Sets the initial layout when opening the Items list. You can still flip per-session from the toolbar.
appearance.densityHelp: Compact tightens header controls and listings. Stored on this device.
appearance.localeHelp: Switches every translated string in the app. Stored on this device.
appearance.preferredCurrencyHelp: Personal preference for currency display. Stored values on items keep their per-group currency — this only affects display formatting once wired (follow-up).
appearance.title: Appearance

rows.shortcutsDescription: View every keyboard shortcut used across the app.
rows.whatsNewDescription: See the latest features and updates.

errors.loadFailed: Couldn't load notification preferences. Try again in a moment.
errors.saveFailed: Couldn't save the change. Your previous setting was kept.

rows.channelEmailDescription: Receive notifications at the email address on your account.
rows.maintenanceReminderDescription: Scheduled care alerts for items you've set up.
rows.priceDropDescription: Notify when tracked supply links drop in price.
rows.warrantyExpiryDescription: Get notified 60, 30, and 7 days before a warranty expires.
rows.weeklyDigestDescription: Summary of inventory changes and upcoming expirations.

activityTab.emptyDescription: We're building a personalised activity feed. Until then, item-level history lives on each commodity's detail page.

profile.defaultGroupHelp: After login you'll land here. Pick another group at any time.

edit.emailReadOnlyHelp: Email changes aren't available here yet — contact support to update the address on your account.
edit.errorGeneric: Couldn't save your profile. Please try again.
edit.subtitle: Update your display name and default group.
edit.title: Edit profile

groupsTab.emptyDescription: Create a group or accept an invite to start tracking inventory.
groupsTab.emptyTitle: You're not in any groups yet

profile.heading: My Profile
profile.noGroupsHelp: You'll land here automatically after login once you create or join one.
profile.noGroupsTitle: You're not in any group yet

password.errorGeneric: Couldn't change your password. Please try again.
password.subtitle: Use a strong password you don't use anywhere else.
password.successBody: You'll be signed out so the new password takes effect on every device.
password.title: Change password

profile.subtitle: Your account, identity, and group preferences.
